nasb.text: Then the sons of Judah fought against Jerusalem and captured it and struck it with the edge of the sword and set the city on fire.

esv.text: And the men of Judah fought against Jerusalem and captured it and struck it with the edge of the sword and set the city on fire.

cnv.text: 猶大人攻打耶路撒冷，把城佔領，用刀擊殺了城中的居民，又放火燒城。

ccb.text: 犹大人攻陷耶路撒冷，杀了城内的所有居民，并放火焚城。
